data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Google employs a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes container orchestration with Kubernetes for deploying services independently.

data.title: Load Balancing
data.description: Google uses advanced load balancing techniques to efficiently handle traffic.
data.technical_spec: Global load balancing with Anycast and latency-based routing.

data.title: Redundancy and Failover
data.description: Multiple data center redundancies and failover mechanisms ensure high availability.
data.technical_spec: Employed across diverse geographic locations to minimize downtime.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Google's CDN enhances content distribution and reduces latency.
data.technical_spec: Integrates edge caching and a distributed infrastructure.

data.title: Cloud Infrastructure
data.description: Powered by Google Cloud Platform offering robust computational resources.
data.technical_spec: Leverages GCP for dynamic scaling and secure environment.
